why_this_action.summary: Refreshed live directory-listing and backlink evidence so the loop can reuse real approvals (3 live listing(s)) instead of stacking more low-intent submissions. Scheduled an automatic post-hold marketer rerun at the updated short-window release time.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
